title: Implement a DataCase.setup_sandbox/1 helper that handles all modes
prompt: Write `test/support/data_case.ex` with a `setup_sandbox/1` public helper function that accepts a tags map and: (1) if `tags[:shared]` is truthy, use `checkout/2` + `mode(:shared, self())` pattern, (2) if `tags[:async]` is truthy AND no `:shared` tag, use `start_owner!/2` with `shared: false` and register stop_owner in on_exit, (3) otherwise default to `start_owner!/2` with `shared: true` and register stop_owner. Include the DataCase module wrapper and `setup tags do setup_sandbox(tags); :ok end`.
tier_rationale: Requires correctly combining three APIs with tag-based branching — non-trivial surface area.
